title: waiting on virtual interface clocking causes Internal Error: ../V3Width.cpp:2818: MemberSel of non-variable
body:
```
%Error: Internal Error: bfm.sv:33:16: ../V3Width.cpp:2818: MemberSel of non-variable
                                                               : ... note: In instance 'top'
   33 |          @(vif.cb);
      |                ^~
                        driver_if.sv:101:13: ... Location of found object
  101 |    clocking cb @(posedge clk);
      |             ^~
```

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
time verilator  --cc --exe -sv --assert --trace --trace-params --trace-structs --report-unoptflat --no-timing --timescale 1ps/1ps --x-assign unique --Mdir verilator_obj_dir --top-module top --timing -F src_files.f top.v
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
v5.026-gd5cfe1a37
```

What OS and distribution are you using?
```
Linux 5.14.0-427.20.1.el9_4.x86_64
```
